Visa requirements for Georgian citizens

  • العربية
  • فارسی
  • Հայերեն
  • ქართული
  • Қазақша

Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Administrative entry restrictions

Visa requirements for Georgian citizens are administrative entry restrictions by the authorities of other states placed on citizens of Georgia.

As of 2025, Georgian citizens had visa-free or visa on arrival access to 122 countries and territories, ranking the Georgian passport 43rd, according to the Henley Passport Index.[1]

Georgian citizens in other countries also can benefit from the Agreement on Visa-Free Movement of Citizens of the Commonwealth of Independent States across the Territory of its Participants signed on 09 October 1992[2] and the CIS Convention on Legal Assistance and Legal Relations in Civil, Family and Criminal Cases signed on 22 January 1993.[3]

Visa requirements map

[edit]

Visa requirements

[edit]
Country Visa requirement Allowed stay Notes (excluding departure fees)
Afghanistan Visa required[4]
Albania Visa not required[5] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Algeria Visa required[6]
Andorra Visa not required[7]
  • Andorra does not have its own visa policy. The Schengen Area visa policy applies to Andorra.
Angola Visa required[8]
Antigua and Barbuda Visa not required[9] 180 days
Argentina Visa not required[10] 90 days
Armenia Visa not required[11] 180 days
  • ID card valid for entry to Armenia for Georgians, passport not required.[12]
Australia Online Visa required[13][14]
  • May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa).
Austria Visa not required[15] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Azerbaijan Visa not required[16] 90 days
Bahamas Visa not required[17] 90 days
Bahrain eVisa / Visa on arrival[18] 14 days
Bangladesh Visa on arrival[19] 30 days
Barbados Visa not required[20] 28 days
Belarus Visa not required[21] 90 days
Belgium Visa not required[22] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Belize Visa required[23]
Benin eVisa[24][25] 30 days
  • Must have an international vaccination certificate.
Bhutan eVisa[26][27]
Bolivia Online Visa / Visa on arrival[28] 30 days[29]
Bosnia and Herzegovina Visa not required[30] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Botswana eVisa[31][32] 3 months
Brazil Visa not required[33] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Brunei Visa required[34]
Bulgaria Visa not required[35] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Burkina Faso eVisa[36][37]
Burundi Visa on arrival[38] 1 month
Cambodia eVisa / Visa on arrival[39][40] 30 days
Cameroon eVisa[41][42]
Canada Visa required[43]
Cape Verde Visa on arrival[44]
Central African Republic Visa required[45]
Chad Visa required[46]
Chile Visa not required[47] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
China Visa not required[48] 30 days
  • A maximum of 90 days within any 180 day period.
Colombia Visa not required[49] 90 days
Comoros Visa on arrival[50] 45 days
Republic of the Congo Visa required[51]
Democratic Republic of the Congo eVisa[52][53] 7 days
Costa Rica Visa required[54]
  • 90 days visa free if holding a valid, multiple-entry visa or residence permit issued by the Canada or the United States, or permanent resident card issued by the United Kingdom or the Schengen Area
Côte d'Ivoire eVisa[55][56] 3 months
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport.
Croatia Visa not required[57] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Cuba eVisa[58][59] 90 days
  • Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee.
Cyprus Visa not required[60] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.[Note 1]
Czech Republic Visa not required[61] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Denmark Visa not required[62] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Djibouti eVisa[63][64] 90 days
Dominica Visa not required[65] 21 days
Dominican Republic Visa not required[66] 60 days
Ecuador Visa not required[67] 90 days
Egypt eVisa / Visa on arrival[68][69] 30 days
El Salvador Visa required[70]
  • 90 days visa free if hold multiple entries visa or permanent resident card issued by Canada, the United States or the Schengen Area
Equatorial Guinea eVisa[71][72]
Eritrea Visa required[73]
Estonia Visa not required[74] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Eswatini Visa required[75]
Ethiopia eVisa[76][77] up to 90 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.
Fiji Visa not required[78][79] 4 months
Finland Visa not required[80] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
France Visa not required[81] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Gabon eVisa[82][83] 90 days
  • e-visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport.
Gambia Visa required[84]
Germany Visa not required[85] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Ghana Visa required[86]
Greece Visa not required[87] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Grenada Visa not required[88] 90 days
Guatemala Visa required[89]
  • 90 days visa free if hold multiple entries visa or permanent resident card issued by Canada, the United States or the Schengen Area
Guinea eVisa[90][91] 90 days
Guinea-Bissau Visa on arrival[92] 90 days
Guyana Visa required[93]
Haiti Visa not required[94] 90 days
Honduras Visa required[95]
  • 90 days visa free if hold multiple entries visa or permanent resident card issued by Canada, the United States or the Schengen Area
Hungary Visa not required[96] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Iceland Visa not required[97] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
India eVisa[98] 30 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports[Note 2] or 5 designated seaports.[Note 3][99]
  • An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.[100]
  • Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.[101]
Indonesia eVisa[102]
Iran Visa not required[103] 45 days
Iraq eVisa[104]
Ireland Visa required[105]
Israel ETA-IL[106][107] 90 days
Italy Visa not required[108] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Jamaica Visa on arrival[109]
Japan Visa required[110]
Jordan eVisa / Visa on arrival[111][112] 90 days
Kazakhstan Visa not required[113] 90 days
Kenya Electronic Travel Authorisation[114][115] 90 days
  • Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.
  • eTA fee is USD 32.50.
  • Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
Kiribati Visa required[116]
North Korea Visa required[117]
South Korea Visa required[118]
  • Visa-free access to Jeju Island for 30 days.
Kuwait eVisa / Visa on arrival[119][120] 90 days
Kyrgyzstan Visa not required[121] 90 days
Laos eVisa / Visa on arrival[122] 30 days
  • 18[Note 4] of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.[123]
  • e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 5], in Boten (road and railroad), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station).[123]
  • Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 6] and 7 border crossings.[Note 7][123]
Latvia Visa not required[124] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area[Note 1]
Lebanon Free visa on arrival[125] 30 days
  • 1 month extendable for 2 additional months.
    • Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket.
Lesotho eVisa[126][127]
Liberia Visa required[128]
Libya eVisa[129][130]
Liechtenstein Visa not required[131] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Lithuania Visa not required[132] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Luxembourg Visa not required[133] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Madagascar eVisa / Visa on arrival[134][135] 60 days
Malawi eVisa / Visa on arrival[136][137] 90 days
Malaysia Visa not required[138] 30 days
Maldives Free visa on arrival[139] 30 days
Mali Visa required[140]
Malta Visa not required[141] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Marshall Islands Visa on arrival[142] 90 days
Mauritania eVisa[143][144]
  • Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport.
Mauritius Visa not required[145] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 360 day period.
Mexico Visa required[146][147]
  • Mexican visas aren't needed for stays under 180 days for tourism, transit, or unpaid activities if the individual holds a valid multiple entry visa or permanent residency from specified countries, including the US, Canada, Japan, the UK, and Schengen countries. Switzerland's "C" permit is considered equivalent to a permanent residency. Holders of Switzerland's "B" permit from visa-required countries must apply for a Mexican visa at the embassy.[148]
Micronesia Visa not required[149] 30 days
Moldova Visa not required[150] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180-day period.
Monaco Visa not required[151]
  • Monaco has no its own visa policy, visa policy of the Schengen area covers staying in Monaco.
Mongolia Visa required[152]
Montenegro Visa not required[153] 90 days
Morocco Visa required[154]
Mozambique eVisa / Visa on arrival[155][156] 30 days
Myanmar eVisa[157][158] 28 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.
  • e-Visa is available for tourism only.
Namibia Visa required[159]
Nauru Visa required[160]
  Nepal Online Visa / Visa on arrival[161] 90 days[162]
Netherlands Visa not required[163] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
New Zealand Visa required[164]
  • Diplomatic, service and standard passports with the former USSR symbol issued in Georgia are unacceptable, and visas will not be endorsed in them.[165]
  • Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.[166]
Nicaragua Visa on arrival[167] 90 days
Niger Visa required[168]
Nigeria eVisa[169][170] 90 days
North Macedonia Visa not required[171] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Norway Visa not required[172] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Oman Visa not required[173] 14 days
  • 30 days e-Visa also available [174]
Pakistan eVisa[175] 90 days
Palau Free visa on arrival[176] 30 days
Panama Visa not required[177] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Papua New Guinea Easy Visitor Permit[178] 60 days
  • Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category.
Paraguay Visa not required[179] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Peru Visa not required[180] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Philippines Visa required[181]
  • Residents of the United Arab Emirates may obtain an eVisa through the official Philippine eVisa website. A valid Emirati residence visa must be shown upon an eVisa application.[182][183]
Poland Visa not required[184] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Portugal Visa not required[185] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Qatar Visa not required[186] 30 days
Romania Visa not required[187] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Russia Visa not required[188]
  • Unlimited for the duration of study or work.[189]
Rwanda eVisa / Visa on arrival[190][191] 30 days
Saint Kitts and Nevis Electronic Travel Authorisation[192][193] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Saint Lucia Visa not required[194] 6 weeks
Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Visa not required[195] 3 months
Samoa Visa not required[196] 90 days
San Marino Visa not required[197]
  • San Marino has no its own visa policy, visa policy of the Schengen area covers staying in San Marino.
São Tomé and Príncipe eVisa[198][199]
Saudi Arabia eVisa / Visa on arrival[200][201] 90 days
Senegal Visa required[202]
Serbia Visa not required[203] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Seychelles Electronic Border System[204][205] 3 months
  • Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.
  • Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
  • Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.
  • Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.
Sierra Leone eVisa[206][207] 3 months
Singapore eVisa[208]
  • May obtain an e-Visa through authorized travel agencies or through local sponsors (Singapore citizens or permanent residents).[248]
  • Visa-free transit for 96 hours. Visa application can be submitted online using the 'e-Service' through a strategic partner or a local contact in Singapore.[209]
Slovakia Visa not required[210] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Slovenia Visa not required[211] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Solomon Islands Visa required[212]
Somalia eVisa[213][214] 30 days
  • Available at Bosaso Airport, Galcaio Airport and Mogadishu Airport.
South Africa Visa required[215]
  • Visa Free Access announced. Dates to be confirmed.[216]
South Sudan eVisa[217][218]
  • Obtainable online.
  • Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.
Spain Visa not required[219] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Sri Lanka eVisa / Visa on arrival[220][221] 60 days / 30 days
  • The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.[222]
  • Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa):
    • SAARC - USD 35
    • Non SAARC - USD 75
  • e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.
  • If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period).
Sudan Visa required[223]
Suriname Visa not required[224][225] 90 days
  • An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.[226]
  • Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.[227]
Sweden Visa not required[228] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
 Switzerland Visa not required[229] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.[Note 1]
Syria Visa on arrival[230] 15 days
  • According to the Law No. 2 of 2014 all visitors require visas prior to arrival.[231][232][233] According to the IATA database, visa may be obtained on arrival and is valid for 15 days.[234]
Tajikistan Visa not required[235] Unlimited
Tanzania eVisa / Visa on arrival[236][237] 90 days
Thailand Visa not required[238] 60 days
Timor-Leste Visa on arrival[239] 30 days
Togo eVisa[240][241] 15 days
Tonga Visa required[242]
Trinidad and Tobago Visa required[243]
Tunisia Visa not required (conditional)[244] 30 days
  • Visa not required for a booked package tour through a travel agency authorized by Tunisian government.
Turkey Visa not required[245] 90 days
  • ID card valid for entry to Turkey for Georgians, passport not required.
Turkmenistan Visa required[246]
Tuvalu Visa on arrival[247] 30 days
Uganda eVisa / Visa on arrival[248][249] 3 months
Ukraine Visa not required[250] 90 days
  • ID card valid for entry to Ukraine for Georgians, passport not required.
United Arab Emirates Visa not required[251] 90 days
United Kingdom Visa required[252]
United States Visa required[253]
Uruguay Visa not required[254] 90 days
Uzbekistan Visa not required[255] Unlimited
Vanuatu Visa required[256]
Vatican City Visa not required[257]
  • Vatican City has no its own visa policy, visa policy of the Schengen area covers staying in Vatican City.
Venezuela Visa required[258]
Vietnam eVisa[259][260] 90 days
  • Visa free when visit Phu Quoc Island
Yemen Visa required[261]
Zambia eVisa / Visa on arrival[262][263] 90 days
Zimbabwe Visa on arrival[264][265] 30 days
  • Can be extended up to 90 days

Dependent, Disputed, or Restricted territories

[edit]

Unrecognized or partially recognized countries

Visitor to Conditions of access Notes
Kosovo Visa required[266] Visa not required for holders of a valid biometric residence permit issued by one of the Schengen member states or a valid multi-entry Schengen Visa, a holder of a valid Laissez-Passer issued by United Nations Organizations, NATO, OSCE, Council of Europe or European Union a holder of a valid travel documents issued by EU Member and Schengen States, United States of America, Canada, Australia and Japan based on the 1951 Convention on Refugee Status or the 1954 Convention on the Status of Stateless Persons, as well as holders of valid travel documents for foreigners (max. 15 days stay)[267]
Northern Cyprus Visa not required[268]
Palestine Visa not required[269] Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.[270]
Somaliland Visa on arrival 30 days for 30 USD, payable on arrival.[271][272]
Taiwan Visa required[273]
Transnistria Visa not required[274] Registration required after 24h.[275][276]
Dependent and autonomous territories
Visitor to Conditions of access Notes
China
Hong Kong Visa not required[277] 30 days
Macau Visa on arrival[278] 30 days
Denmark
Faroe Islands Visa not required[279]
Greenland Visa not required[280]
France
French Guiana Visa required[281]
French Polynesia Visa required[282]
French West Indies Visa required French West Indies refers to Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy.
Mayotte Visa required[283]
New Caledonia Visa not required[284] 90 days within any 180 day period
Réunion Visa required[285]
Saint Pierre and Miquelon Visa required[286]
Wallis and Futuna Visa required[287]
Netherlands
Aruba eVisa[288] 30 days
Caribbean Netherlands (includes Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba) Visa required[289]
Curaçao Visa required[290]
Sint Maarten Visa required[291]
New Zealand
Cook Islands Visa not required[292] 31 days
Niue Visa not required[293] 30 days
Tokelau Visa required[294]
United Kingdom
Anguilla eVisa[295] Holders of a valid visa issued by the United Kingdom do not require a visa.[296]
Bermuda Visa required[297] Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days if transiting through the United Kingdom.
British Indian Ocean Territory Special permit required Special permit required.[298]
British Virgin Islands Visa required[299]
Cayman Islands Visa required[300]
Falkland Islands Visa required[301]
Gibraltar Visa required[302]
Montserrat eVisa[303]
Pitcairn Islands Visa not required 14 days visa free and landing fee 35 USD or tax of 5 USD if not going ashore.[304][305][306]
Ascension Island eVisa[307][308] 90 days within any year period.
Saint Helena eVisa[309][310]
Tristan da Cunha Permission required Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island or 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands.[311]
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands Permit required Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours / 1 month for 110 / 160 pounds sterling).[312][313]
Turks and Caicos Islands Visa required[314] Holders of a valid visa issued by Canada, United Kingdom or the USA do not required a visa for a maximum stay of 90 days.
United States
American Samoa eVisa[315] 30 days
Guam Visa required[316]
Northern Mariana Islands Visa required[317]
U.S. Virgin Islands Visa required[318]
Antarctica and adjacent islands
Special permits required for Bouvet Island, British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency.[319][320][321][322][323][324][325][326][327][328][329][330]

See also

[edit]
  • Georgia (country) portal
  • Visa policy of Georgia
  • Georgian passport

References and Notes

References
  1. ^ "Global Passport Ranking".

Retrieved 2 August 2025.
  3. ^ "Конвенция о правовой помощи и правовых отношениях по гражданским, семейным и уголовным делам" [Convention on Legal Assistance and Legal Relations in Civil, Family and Criminal Matters]. cis.minsk.by (in Russian). Retrieved 2 August 2025.

  5. ^ Visa regime for foreign citizens, Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs of Albania.

  13. ^ Visitor visa options, Department of Home Affairs of Australia.

  15. ^ Schengen visa, Federal Ministry for Europe, Integration and Foreign Affairs of Austria.

  30. ^ Visas, Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Bosnia and Herzegovina.
  31. ^ Requirements for visa application, Government of Botswana.
  32. ^ "Botswana eVisa".
  33. ^ Visas to travel to Brazil, Ministry of External Relations of Brazil (in Portuguese and English).
  34. ^ Country category for visa application, Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade of Brunei.

  54. ^ International Air Transport Association (IATA), Travel Information Manual
  55. ^ International Air Transport Association (IATA), Travel Information Manual

  231. ^ "Syria issues law imposing visas on its visitors". Al Arabiya English. 12 March 2014.
  232. ^ "القانون 2 لعام 2014 دخول وخروج وإقامة الأجانب في سوريا" [Law 2 of 2014 - Entry, exit and residence of foreigners in Syria]. People's Council of Syria. 12 March 2014. Retrieved 5 November 2017.
  233. ^ قانون يحظر الدخول لسورية أو الخروج منها ...إلا لحامل جواز سفر ساري المفعول أو وثيقة مؤشر عليها بسمة دخول من إحدى البعثات الدبلوماسية السورية [A law prohibiting entering or leaving Syria ... except for a holder of a valid passport or a document marked by an entry visa from a Syrian diplomatic mission] (in Arabic). Al-Watan (Syria). 12 March 2014. Retrieved 5 November 2017.{{cite web}}: CS1 maint: deprecated archival service (link)

1 British Overseas Territories. 2 These countries span the conventional boundary between Europe and Asia. 3 Partially recognized. 4 Unincorporated territory of the United States. 5 Part of the Kingdom of Denmark. 6 Egypt spans the boundary between Africa and Asia. 7 Unrecognized state.

1 British Overseas Territories. 2 Azerbaijan, Georgia, Turkey, Kazakhstan, Russia and the partially recognised republics of Abkhazia and South Ossetia each span the conventional boundary between Europe and Asia. 3 Cyprus, Armenia, and the partially recognised republic of Northern Cyprus are entirely in Western Asia but have socio-political connections with Europe. 4 Egypt spans the boundary between Africa and Asia. 5 Partially recognized.
